programmes.show_description: Action thriller with Jason Momoa. A logging company owner and his family find themselves in a dangerous situation when they uncover a drug trafficker's hidden stash of cocaine in their cabin. (2018)
Riveting crime thriller with Oscar Isaac. A troubled artist drives into the desert seeking solitude, only to meet an unhinged drifter who throws his life drastically off course. (2015)

Hannibal is kidnapped and brought before the mysterious retired General Stockwell, who proposes a mission to free the passengers of a hijacked plane. S5, Ep1
When an alien saucer crashes into a hillside, a ranch woman cares for an Invader survivor. Vincent soon hears of the crash and investigates.
Groundbreaking action with Brittany Murphy. A seismologist teams up with an explosives expert to stop the world from being destroyed by a series of devastating earthquakes. (2009)

programmes.show_name: The Legend of Butch and Sundance
programmes.show_description: Blazing action-adventure. At the turn of the 20th century, two of America's most notorious outlaws join forces and try to make their fortunes with a string of daring robberies. (2004)
Sci-fi thriller starring Charlie Sheen. A radio astronomer unwittingly uncovers an alien conspiracy to take over the planet and finds his own life in danger. (1996)
Kirk has his memory erased during an investigation on a planet inhabited by a Native American-type civilisation, who begin to believe Kirk is a god. S3, Ep3/24
Vincent learns that an old army friend is accused of murder and suspects that the supposed victim was an Invader - but that defence won't hold up in court!
The team is locked up in Fort Owen to await court martial for the murder of Colonel Morrison, but the prosecutor representing the army has a surprise witness. S5, Ep2

Martial arts adventure with Jet Li. A Chinese detective travels to Paris in search of the head an international drug ring, but ends up framed for murder by a corrupt French cop. (2001)
Martial arts thriller with Jet Li and Jason Statham. An FBI agent is drawn into warfare between Yakuza and Triad gangs as he seeks revenge on the assassin who murdered his partner. (2007)
Apartheid drama with Stephen Dorff. An English youngster is shocked by the brutal racism endemic in his South African school, and vows to do everything he can to fight for justice. (1992)

Slithering scares from Hammer. A couple move to a Cornish village where it becomes apparent that locals are being killed by a snake-like creature and their neighbour harbours a terrible secret. (1966)
